name: Test (Flippable)
description: Verification deck for multiple glossary links in flashcards.

cards.note:
**[er:2]**

**[er:3]**

This card tests two modals at the top. The first is [Subject Questions] and the second is [Auxiliary Inversion]. Use [Who] directly as the subject.

**[er:11]**

Testing a single modal link here. This explains [Should Have] for past regrets. Do not use ~must have~ for advice.

cards.sideA: I'm used to waking up early.
sideB: I'm used to waking up early.
cards.note:
**[er:15]**

**[er:14]**

Double modal test: [Used To] and [Interested In] pattern rules. Remember that prepositions are followed by ~gerunds~.

**[er:68]**

**[er:72]**

Comparing [Collective Nouns] like police with [Indefinite Pronouns] like everybody. One is plural, one is singular.

**[er:155]**

**[er:157]**

SQL context test: [Above] and [Below] connectors for UNION operations. Use them to describe ~spatial hierarchy~.

**[pv:1]**

Testing a phrasal-verb modal (Agree with). Cross-glossary: [no er: link here].
Checking that ~errors~ are still highlighted in yellow.

**[er:5]**

**[pv:2]**

Cross-glossary card: grammar modal [Present Perfect] from er: plus phrasal-verb modal [Apologize for] from pv:. Both should render as clickable links.
